description: You are a post-production coordinator at a dubbing studio. Using VLC, analyze the master video at /home/ga/Videos/festival_master.mp4 and the work order at /home/ga/Documents/dubbing_work_order.txt to prepare derivative deliverables. Extract the English, Spanish, and French audio tracks as separate 192kbps MP3 files (audio_english.mp3, audio_spanish.mp3, audio_french.mp3). Create a video-only copy with no audio streams (video_only.mp4) and an English reference copy containing the video and only the English audio track (english_reference.mp4). Generate a technical stream inventory at /home/ga/Videos/dubbing_deliverables/stream_
